title: stelis oaxacana
intro: Stelis oaxacana, a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, is native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis oaxacana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Stelis oaxacana are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
